commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `small` direct live-model profile for constrained Qwen/GLM routes, wires selection and dynamic candidates into agent live-model tests, and updates live-testing docs.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +98, Docs +7. Total +166 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds an operator-facing live-test profile rather than reporting a reproducible product bug. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the `small` profile and the branch adds focused tests for the new selection path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-authored, draft, and protected by the `maintainer` label; the remaining action is human acceptance of live-proof scope and broad-gate timing, not an automated repair.

target.title: test(agents): add small model live profile
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` for the direct live model matrix, covering constrained Qwen/GLM routes without expanding the modern profile.
- Reuses the curated-priority selection path for the small profile and passes the small refs into dynamic provider materialization.
- Documents the direct small profile plus the separate Ollama Cloud live smoke.

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/small-model-live-$USER-$$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/live-model-filter.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-transport.test.ts` - 5 files / 139 tests passed on `1c42bf3c28`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- Previous Ollama Cloud live smoke: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=glm-5.1:cloud OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS=0 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts`
- Previous Crabbox AWS changed gate on the same patch shape: `run_83fe159a34d9`, lease `cbx_c700d99e4cc8`, slug `pearl-krill`, `corepack pnpm check:changed`, exit 0. Current rebased SHA has focused proof; a fresh broad gate is waiting for current-main type gate unblocker #87750.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Maintainers can run a named direct small-model live profile instead of maintaining one-off comma lists for constrained Qwen/GLM coverage.

Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest/docs/lint after rebase, previous live Ollama Cloud API with `glm-5.1:cloud`, and previous AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate for the same patch shape.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Commands listed in Verification.

Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed; dynamic materialization now receives small refs; previous Ollama Cloud live smoke passed with 2 tests passed and 2 skipped; previous Crabbox `run_83fe159a34d9` exited 0; autoreview clean.

Observed result after fix: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` is parsed as a curated direct profile and selected with small-profile priority/capping, including dynamic small OpenRouter/Z.AI/Qwen refs.

What was not tested: Direct `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` against OpenRouter/Z.AI/Qwen API keys in this environment; previous live proof covered hosted Ollama with `OLLAMA_API_KEY`; fresh broad changed gate on latest SHA until #87750 lands.
